heading: Additional rights and remedies; exclusive jurisdiction of district court; res judicata
label: 466 Additional rights and remedies; exclusive jurisdiction of district court; res judicata
text: The rights and remedies provided by this subchapter shall be in addition to any and all other rights and remedies at law or in equity: , That upon the filing of a complaint by the Secretary the jurisdiction of the district court over such trusteeship shall be exclusive and the final judgment shall be res judicata.Provided
